name: The Recount
text:
Each player counts the permanents they control out loud, at the same time, as fast as they can. Whoever finishes first and is not wrong gains control of the most recently cast spell.
If two players tie, they must instead settle it with one round of rock-paper-scissors. No best of three. Democracy is fast and cruel.
flavorText: "I demand a recount!" — every goblin, eventually
